home.heroLead: Curvio is an open-source platform for recording donations, acts of kindness, and free open-source projects. No fundraising. No rankings. Just a quiet record of long-term goodwill.
home.founderNote: I started Curvio to record small donations while I was still a student. The amounts were not large, but the habit mattered. I hope this place helps more people keep goodwill visible, quiet, and lasting.
home.platformLead: Direct links to trusted organizations. Curvio facilitates connection, not collection.
home.whyBody: Curvio is built on the belief that goodwill does not need gamification. We intentionally avoid leaderboards, badges, likes, and competitive metrics.

explore.title: Explore the public archive
explore.lead: Browse recent public records across donations, kindness, and open-source work.

donate.title: Official Giving Platforms
donate.notice: Curvio does not collect donations. All links below lead to official organization websites.
donate.transparencyBody: We select platforms that demonstrate clear reporting and institutional trust. Always verify organizations independently before making a significant contribution.

about.title: A quiet place for long-term goodwill
about.lead: Curvio is not a fundraising platform. It is a digital public-welfare journal for recording donations, kindness, and free open-source work.
about.principleThree: Long-term commitment first, short-term heat second.
about.boundaryBody: No private payment links, no donation amount leaderboards, no likes, no rankings, and no personal fundraising funnel.

auth.note: Authentication is reserved for the Supabase phase. This form is a front-end shell.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.lead: A calm workspace for managing your public-welfare archive.
dashboard.comingSoon: This is a static shell for the first phase. Supabase-backed publishing comes next.
dashboard.descriptionPlaceholder: What happened? Keep it honest and simple.
dashboard.profileLayoutNote: Choose which sections appear on your public profile and keep them in a quiet order.
